titleStmt.title: SII 9.691: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 691. (A.R. No. 687 of 1919.) ON A STONE LYING NEAR THE BASAVANNA WELL AT BELUDONA, ALUR TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1514, Nandana, Vaiśākha, śu. 15, corresponding to A.D. 1592 April 16, Sunday (not verifiable), in the reign of Veṅkaṭapatidēva-Mahārāya. It records that Rāhuta Liṅgappa-Nāyaka of Chippagiri-sīme, agent to the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Aḷiya-Raghunātharājayadēva-Mahā-arasu, made a gift of land to five persons (named) for repairing a water-well at Beḷudoṇe to the north of the road called Daṇḍina-dāri. The gift was made for the merit of Vēṅgaḷarājayya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrījayādbhudayaśālivāhana
śakavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1514 neya naṁdanasaṁvatsa
rada vaiśākha śu 15 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśva
ra vīrapratāpa śrīvīraveṁkaṭapatidēvamahārāyaru
pruthvīsā(ṁ)mrājyava māḍalāgi śrīma(ṁn)nmahāmaṁḍalē
śvara Aḷiya raghunātharājayadēvamahā(ṁ)arasu
gaḷa kāryake kartarāda cippagiri sīmeya pā
kāci rāhuta liṁgappanāyakaru vulucala cavuḍi re
mudiyapanāgaya saṁtaya Elagoṁḍa saha ja 5 rige koṭa
bhāvi mānyada kramaveṁteṁdare daṁḍinadārige vutaradalu be
ḷudoṇeya holadoḷage pūrvadalu mādigoṁḍana bhā
vi khilavāgi neṭu samavāgi Iralāgi hostāgi bhāvi Agu
du kallakaṭeya kaṭi nīru kāṇisidare veṁgaḷarājayana
varige pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgi Ā bāvige vutaradikina kuṁṭevoḷage O
kuḷa 1 Oṁdu vokuḷada holanu sarvamānyavāgi
Anubhavisuvudu yidake Āru tappi
dare mātāpiturugaḷa vāraṇāsiya
li vadhisida pāpake hōharu .
Digital edition of SII 9.691 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
